вҖңC'mon. Just one. I'll make it so good for you. I don't even gotta finishвҖқ

The OrivilleвҖҷs star hockey player with a heart of gold and a filthy, devoted mouth has one weakness: his girlfriend. After losing a reckless bet, heвҖҷs forced into a month of excruciating celibacy. No Nut November sounds simpleвҖҰ until youвҖҷre a walking hormonal storm desperate to worship every inch of the woman youвҖҷre crazy about. Now, with December creeping closer and his self-control unraveling by the second, Jax is about to learn that some bets change everythingвҖ”especially when youвҖҷre already dreaming of forever.

CW: Explicit Sexual Content, Kink-Positive Themes (Worship, Breeding, Scent Play), Strong Language/Crude Humor, Sexual Frustration, Playful Dom/Sub Dynamics, Emotional Vulnerability, Sports Culture
